Bus Timings

Abu Dhabi Bus 110 Schedule Khalifa Bin Zayed Street to National Petroleum Corporation

March 23, 2026
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Reg Bus 110 is a key player in Abu Dhabi’s public transportation network, connecting the busy Al Danah district with the industrial zone of Mussafah. Serving both residents and visitors, this route offers a reliable and affordable travel option, running from Sultan Bin Zayed Street/Khalifa Bin Zayed Street to Street 16/National Petroleum Corporation.

As Abu Dhabi continues to grow, Reg Bus 110 remains essential, linking commercial, residential, and industrial areas, providing easy access to workplaces, shopping centers, and other important destinations.

Operational Details

Reg Bus 110 operates with consistent frequency throughout the day:

From Khalifa Bin Zayed Street From National Petroleum Corporation
05:47 07:03
06:02 07:18
06:17 07:33
06:32 07:48
06:47 08:03

Download PDF Bus 110

Bus 110 Timetable

For the full schedule, you can visit the official AD Mobility website or follow this link to view the 110 Bus Timings.

Ticket Pricing:

  • Cash Ticket: AED 2.00, with an additional AED 0.05 per kilometer.

  • Payment Methods: Tickets can be purchased or topped up using the Hafilat Smart Card, available at multiple locations. For detailed fare information, visit the Abu Dhabi Department of Transport’s website.

Route Overview

Reg Bus 110 starts its journey at Al Danah, Sultan Bin Zayed Street/Khalifa Bin Zayed Street, and ends at Mussafah, Street 16/National Petroleum Corporation.

  1. Capital Park A popular spot for relaxation and outdoor activities.

  2. Gold Center A renowned commercial hub for jewelry and retail shopping.

  3. Mariam Bint Said Mosque A peaceful mosque situated along the route.

  4. Abu Dhabi Bus Station A major hub connecting passengers to various bus routes.

  5. Mohamed Bin Khalifa Street A central road in Abu Dhabi.

  6. Al Jazeera Sports Club A venue for sports and recreational activities.

  7. Al Maqta Bus Interchange A key transfer point for connecting bus routes.

  8. Street 15 A mixed-use area with both commercial and residential buildings.

  9. Civil Defence Near Abu Dhabi’s emergency services.

  10. Street 11 A notable residential area.

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

  1. ADNOC The headquarters of the UAE’s leading energy company.

  2. ICAD Residential City Main Gate The gateway to the industrial city.

  3. ICAD Residential City Gate 2 An additional entry to the industrial zone.

  4. Medical Industries Home to medical-related businesses and industries.

  5. Friday Market A vibrant local market offering a variety of goods.

  6. Gulf Steel Industries Located in the heart of the steel production zone.

  7. National Petroleum Corporation The final stop on the route, serving the petroleum industry.

The complete journey takes approximately 64 minutes, providing a convenient option for commuters and travelers.

Accessibility Features

Reg Bus 110 is designed with accessibility in mind, featuring ramps, designated seating for differently-abled passengers, and audio-visual aids for those with hearing or vision impairments. This ensures a comfortable and inclusive experience for all passengers, allowing everyone to travel with ease and dignity across the city.

Connectivity and Transfer Points

Reg Bus 110 integrates seamlessly with other bus routes, particularly at Al Maqta Bus Interchange and Abu Dhabi Bus Station, making transfers easy and helping travelers reach destinations across Abu Dhabi and beyond. This network will also integrate with future metro services, further enhancing connectivity.

Nearby Attractions

  • Capital Park

  • Gold Center
  • Mariam Bint Said Mosque
  • Abu Dhabi Bus Station

Journey Experience

This route provides a comprehensive view of Abu Dhabi’s blend of business, culture, and industry.

Travel Tips

To make your trip more enjoyable, consider traveling during off-peak hours to avoid crowds. Stay updated on real-time bus schedules and route changes by downloading the Abu Dhabi Department of Transport app. It’s also useful to carry a portable phone charger to keep your devices powered for on-the-go updates.

Its extensive list of stops ensures convenient access to key locations across the city.

Whether you’re commuting to work, running errands, or exploring Abu Dhabi, Reg Bus 110 provides a cost-effective, eco-friendly, and efficient solution for urban mobility. Hop on this route and experience Abu Dhabi’s public transport at its best! To explore more routes and plan your journey efficiently, take a look at the Full Abu Dhabi Bus Routes for a comprehensive guide to all available services.

Official UAE Sources

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: March 23, 2026.

Written by Al Khaleej
